title: CoachingResponse
description: Full colloquial coaching response with message, reasoning, and optional enrichment surfaces.

message.description: Main coaching reply in plain language. Required. Must be written in the locale specified in the request.

reasoning_used.description: Ordered list of reasoning steps the coach used to reach the answer. Show the user's own numbers.

step.description: Short label for this reasoning step (e.g. 'Check monthly margin')

detail.description: One sentence explanation referencing the user's actual data.

content_cards.description: Unified content cards: articles, videos, slides, partner offers, and microlearning snippets from the content catalog. Only populate from search_content tool results.

concept.description: For card_type=learn: the financial concept name

interactive_cards.description: Interactive action cards. Currently only 'reminder' type is supported.

transaction_evidence.description: Mini-table of actual user transactions backing the advice. Populated only when the coach cites specific transactions from search_user_transactions results. Null otherwise.

subtitle.description: Brief explanation of how progress was estimated

goal_progress.description: Progress toward a stated user goal. LLM-estimated from profile + transactions + margin. Fires only when conversation context is relevant to a stated goal. Null otherwise.

details_a2ui.description: A2UI JSONL string with surfaceUpdate/dataModelUpdate/beginRendering messages for rich detail UI rendering. Null or absent if no structured detail is needed.

verdict.description: Whether the user can afford the item: yes, no, or conditional (can afford it but with trade-offs or caveats).

key_figures.description: 2-4 key numbers that support the verdict. Always include monthly margin and the item cost.

label.description: Short label in the response locale, e.g. 'Margine mensile'

affordability_verdict.description: Populated only when the user asks an affordability question ('can I afford X?', 'should I buy Y?'). Null for all other question types.

value.description: Human-readable insight fact (e.g. 'risparmia circa il 12% del reddito mensile')

headline.description: Short insight title in the response locale

data_point.description: The specific number or fact that triggered this insight

educational_framing.description: One sentence explaining why this matters financially

expires_days.description: Optional: days until this insight expires

new_insight.description: Emit when the conversation reveals a new pattern or insight about the user's finances. Persisted silently — NOT rendered as a visible card. Null if nothing new emerged.
